home.title: TimberCraft Rwanda | Ubuhanga Bwiza, Umurage Uhoraho
home.description: Ibicuruzwa by'ibiti byiza cyane, ibikoresho byo mu nzu bikorewe ku giti cyawe, n'ibisubizo by'ibiti birambye bikorerwa mu Rwanda.

about.title: Abo Turi Bo | TimberCraft Rwanda
about.description: Menya TimberCraft Rwanda, isosiyete y'Abanyarwanda ikora ibiti ihuza ubuhanga gakondo n'ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.

products.title: Ibicuruzwa Byacu | TimberCraft Rwanda
products.description: Reba urutonde rw'ibicuruzwa byacu by'ibiti: ibikoresho by'inzu, imiryango n'amadirishya, ibikoresho by'ibiro, gusoza imbere, ibisubizo byo gupakira, n'igurishwa ry'ibiti.

services.title: Serivisi Zacu | TimberCraft Rwanda
services.description: Ibisubizo byuzuye byo gukora no gutunganya ibiti, birimo ibikoresho bikorerwa ku giti cyawe, gushushanya imbere, gutunganya ibiti, n'ubujyanama.

projects.title: Imishinga Yacu | TimberCraft Rwanda
projects.description: Reba imishinga twarangije mu mazu, ibigo by'ubucuruzi, n'ahantu ho kwakira abashyitsi hirya no hino mu Rwanda.

sustainability.title: Ibidukikije | TimberCraft Rwanda
sustainability.description: Ibihango byacu byo kubona ibiti mu buryo burambye, umusaruro witaho ibidukikije, gutera amashyamba, n'inyungu ku baturage.

contact.title: Twandikire | TimberCraft Rwanda
contact.description: Twandikire kuri TimberCraft Rwanda ku bibazo, ibiciro, cyangwa ikindi kintu cyose ku bijyanye n'ibicuruzwa na serivisi zacu z'ibiti.

hero.subtitle: Ibicuruzwa by'ibiti byiza cyane, ibikoresho byo mu nzu bikorewe ku giti cyawe, n'ibisubizo by'ibiti birambye bikorerwa mu Rwanda.

1.title: Ubuhanga Bwiza
1.description: Abakozi b'inzobere batanga ubwiza muri buri gikoresho.

2.title: Ibiti Birambye
2.description: Ibiti tubona mu buryo bwizewe kugira ngo ejo hazaza habe heza.

3.title: Imyubakire Yihariye
3.description: Duhindura ibitekerezo byanyu mu bikorwa hifashishijwe imyubakire idasanzwe.

4.title: Bikomeye kandi Byizewe
4.description: Ibicuruzwa bikomeye, bimara igihe kirekire, byakozwe neza.

5.title: Kugeza ku Gihe
5.description: Kugeza no kwinjiza ibicuruzwa ku gihe cyagenwe, buri gihe.

6.title: Serivisi ku Bakiriya
6.description: Turi hafi yanyu buri gihe kugira ngo tubakorere neza.

1.title: Ibikoresho by'Inzu
1.description: Uburiri, ameza, intebe, amakabine, sofa, ubwato bw'ibitabo n'ibindi byinshi.

2.title: Imiryango n'Amadirishya
2.description: Imiryango, amadirishya n'imbago by'ibiti bifite ireme rihanitse.

3.title: Ibikoresho by'Ibiro
3.description: Ameza y'akazi, ameza y'inama, amakabine n'ibindi bikoresho by'ibiro.

4.title: Gusoza Imbere mu Nzu
4.description: Igisenge, ipangaza ry'inkuta, ubuso bw'ubutaka, ibishushanyo n'ibindi byinshi.

5.title: Ibisubizo byo Gupakira
5.description: Ibipangu by'ibiti, udusanduku, ibirundo by'imigozi n'ibindi byinshi.

about.title: Abo Turi Bo
about.description: TimberCraft Rwanda ni isosiyete y'Abanyarwanda ikora ibiti, yihariye mu bicuruzwa by'ibiti by'ireme rihanitse mu mazu, ubucuruzi, n'imishinga y'ubwubatsi. Duhuza ubuhanga gakondo n'ikoranabuhanga rigezweho kugira ngo dukore ibisubizo by'ibiti bikomeye, byiza, kandi birambye.
about.vision: Kuba isosiyete y'imbere mu Rwanda mu bicuruzwa by'ibiti n'ibindi bikomoka ku biti.
about.mission: Guhindura ibikomoka ku biti biboneka mu gihugu bikaba ibicuruzwa by'urwego rw'isi, mu gihe dukora akazi kandi dushyigikira iterambere rirambye.

1.title: Ubujyanama ku Buntu
1.description: Ganira n'inzobere zacu ku bitekerezo byawe.

footer.tagline: Ibicuruzwa by'ibiti byiza cyane, ibikoresho byo mu nzu bikorewe ku giti cyawe, n'ibisubizo by'ibiti birambye bikorerwa mu Rwanda.

productsPage.subtitle: Ibicuruzwa by'ibiti by'ireme rihanitse byakorewe buri mwanya

aboutPage.title: Abo Turi Bo kuri TimberCraft Rwanda

servicesPage.title: Serivisi Zacu
servicesPage.subtitle: Ibisubizo byuzuye byo gukora no gutunganya ibiti ku bikenewe byawe byose

1.title: Ibikoresho Byihariye
1.description: Ibikoresho byo mu nzu cyangwa ibiro bikorewe ku giti cyawe.

2.title: Gushushanya Imbere
2.description: Gusoza no gushushanya imbere mu buhanga bw'inzobere.

3.title: Gutunganya Ibiti
3.description: Gutunganya no gukemura ibiti by'ireme rihanitse.

4.title: Ubujyanama
4.description: Ubujyanama bw'inzobere ku bwoko bw'ibiti no gutegura umushinga.

projectsPage.title: Imishinga Yacu
projectsPage.subtitle: Reba imishinga yarangiye igaragaza ubuhanga bwacu

1.title: Inzu Nini y'Ubwiza
1.description: Imbere yose mu biti mu nzu y'ubwiza bw'ikirenga.

2.title: Ibiro Bigezweho
2.description: Ameza n'ibitambaro by'ibiro bikorewe ku giti cy'isosiyete y'ikoranabuhanga.

3.title: Ahantu ho Kuruhukira mu Bidukikije
3.description: Amazu mato y'ibiti birambye mu ishyamba ry'ubukerarugendo.

sustainabilityPage.title: Ibidukikije
sustainabilityPage.subtitle: Ibihango byacu byo gukurikiza imikorere irambye no kubahiriza ibidukikije

sourcing.title: Kubona Ibiti mu Buryo Burambye
sourcing.description: Dukura ibiti byacu mu mashyamba yemewe akurikiza imikorere irambye yo gucunga amashyamba.

production.title: Umusaruro Witaho Ibidukikije
production.description: Uburyo bwacu bwo gukora bugabanya imyanda kandi dukoresha uburyo bwitaho ibidukikije.

reforestation.title: Gutera Amashyamba
reforestation.description: Dufatanya mu mishinga yo gutera amashyamba mu karere, kugira ngo dusubize kamere icyayo.

community.title: Inyungu ku Baturage
community.description: Duha amahugurwa n'amahirwe y'akazi abakozi b'ubuhanga n'urubyiruko bo mu gace.

contactPage.title: Twandikire
contactPage.subtitle: Twandikire ku bibazo, ibiciro, cyangwa ikindi kibazo icyo aricyo cyose

form.heading: Twoherereze Ubutumwa
form.disclaimer: Bifungura porogaramu yawe ya imeyili hamwe n'ubu butumwa bumaze kwandikwa — nta makuru yoherezwa cyangwa abikwa kuri seriveri iyo ariyo yose.
form.successMessage: Porogaramu yawe ya imeyili igomba kuba imaze gufungurwa hamwe n'ubutumwa bwawe biteguye koherezwa.

errors.emailRequired: Nyamuneka andika aderesi yawe ya imeyili.
errors.emailInvalid: Nyamuneka andika aderesi ya imeyili yemewe.
